_doc: Enchant combos — when a drop rolls TWO enchants and the pair matches an entry here, both individual enchants are replaced by the combo. Combat reads inst.enchant_combo (the id) and dispatches the matching effect handler in EnchantCombos.gd. Tooltip renders a colored stat line + tints the item sprite by mixing color_a and color_b. Components are sorted alphabetically when matching pairs so order doesn't matter at roll time.

combos.name: Quench
combos.description: Each hit alternates fire and cold; on a frozen target, fire damage doubles.

combos.name: Plasma
combos.description: +25% damage; chance to chain to one adjacent foe on hit.

combos.name: Pyre
combos.description: Burn DoT damages undead and demons +50%.

combos.name: Combustion
combos.description: Poison ticks detonate for 25% of remaining poison damage on expiry.

combos.name: Hellfire
combos.description: Burn DoT cannot be removed; 5% lifesteal on burning targets.

combos.name: Bloodfire
combos.description: On lifesteal hit, target also takes burn DoT.

combos.name: Brittle Storm
combos.description: Frozen targets take +50% lightning damage.

combos.name: Cleansing Frost
combos.description: Freeze duration +50%; freezes ignore Holy resistance.

combos.name: Cryo-toxin
combos.description: Each poison tick slows target by 5% (cap 30%).

combos.name: Hollow Frost
combos.description: Freeze duration +100% on enemies below 50% HP.

combos.name: Heartrime
combos.description: Freezing a target restores 5% max HP.

combos.name: Judgement
combos.description: +10% crit chance; crits chain to one adjacent foe.

combos.name: Acid Storm
combos.description: Lightning hits apply a small poison stack.

combos.name: Stormcurse
combos.description: Damage to enemies in fog cells is doubled.

combos.name: Blood Arc
combos.description: On hit, restore 1% max HP.

combos.name: Sanctified Venom
combos.description: Poison ticks strip enemy buffs (status overlays cleared on tick).

combos.name: Twilight
combos.description: Taking damage buffs your next hit by the lost HP%.

combos.name: Sanctified Drain
combos.description: Lifesteal heals 2× when target is undead/demon.

combos.name: Necrosis
combos.description: Poison DoT bypasses armor.

combos.name: Bloodbloom
combos.description: Lifesteal hits also apply poison.

combos.name: Soulfeed
combos.description: Killing under this enchant restores 10% max HP.
